title: Prompt QA Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger prompt qa foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Prompt QA Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Prompt QA Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good prompt qa foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Prompt QA Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
